settings.text:
Please allow 1 to 3 business days for us to get back to you.

For faster service, for questions about:

  • Fulfillment updates, shipping status, tracking number requests, please include your order number from your order confirmation email or provide the email address you placed your order with.
  • Damaged, leaking, or incorrect items, please include your order number, clear photos of the product including the side of the bottle with the article number and batch number, if accessible, and if you prefer a replacement item or store credit.
  • Missing package? Does your tracking say your package was delivered but you didn't receive it? Please double-check that the shipping address on your order confirmation email is correct. For packages sent via USPS, your mail carrier or local post office can best answer questions about when and where the package was delivered exactly. Sometimes they may leave a package with a neighbor, at a mail station, or another nearby location.

We'll be in touch very soon!

Oshadhi USA Team
